| | | Peter,

The permanent ruling class in Washington is bankrupting us with inflation and debt.

I’ve been clear on my position since beginning my term: For you to have more, Washington must have less.

Debt = politicians stealing from our future and stealing from all of us right now with inflation.

I’m fighting for you in Washington, but I need your support.

[**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e2649c32468145a882110f9a50592d3e&_e=Spo2hiUcnHnbaPYAN4QuVNidA43y1l7vsAAiNz5UZg3t3Z6SNnxZhRxvRWQW6YbZRUIAkHydV3mFrVxAB_DlC2adW0mB631lQc_PoM6O9N4Cp4Hy5vC2RdX5oGeXv4ZDhUck97xVrCK0MrKDQrhSuUAS74uS_zyvKT1jzoy8jcqpvIUaJZPFIVxq_S1hr3Gk_FP0WKiGqU3wi7-cFt8QyiPJr3CD85Y214vYuMBfZKuswVcyJtaC2zsB_TodXMectavykc1ZlmLZV7FsiySNSL6wu-WPNUH1k_8sfrqybmvsWVvHAysz3RU2UpvbbM6SlkuTEvN_DdeoWFyVh5o7vRL8WX7nJzTxgZ-ubvorwuM%3D)

| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=4ff08e8b4f9c477e9516f700df84f608&_e=DUWwBJTBnBxTWO7zzXcTUjiZmaMOJLmKPkUV48TUiAhqZ_YHns1norz60x41bECEdSi5wEu87FUbPxAaUB2ZHy-rh44knxZg-mc-HqexTuJ_BtAsLCFltelDFR6Gv-FI4FjBSUURUS3TBFjX2AFG1ayWiW428ziHVyAj-qJwAmkghJhmrjD4MkiepHIN7xWvpG-Ewu5EQb_-2W5bEk_cLg%3D%3D)

Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, fellow American. Yumi, my entire family, the fantastic team at _An America United_ , and I would like to wish you the best this holiday season.
---
Let's reflect on our blessings and the opportunity we have to live in the greatest country on earth, which allows us to share our values, have civil disagreements, and stands up for our freedom to do so. Thank you for being a part of this important movement and for your support the last few years. We've only just begun and I cannot wait to continue this great work into the new year with you. Merry Christmas,_**Governor Larry Hogan**_

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0223%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fLIPWQFrH%2bgu154%2fM%2fgzZA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44657%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q7SgHYkIsZlISxz02vU2eg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44658%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vLi%2fMaUeB8Rprzsic%2bglLg&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44658%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vLi%2fMaUeB8Rprzsic%2bglLg&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0223%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fLIPWQFrH%2bgu154%2fM%2fgzZA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0223%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fLIPWQFrH%2bgu154%2fM%2fgzZA&sysid=1)

name: American Briefing
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoengcamfl4hvltfrdn6ce2sjc7cg7vhtd3g9u08_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3jm9or4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zufo16iv9a6u2l6bk86620kuelhavgq9262o0r3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3jm9or4cth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfigns9mc50fsp68ltncsbl87pqjvrferiacpflg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3jm9or4cth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Eleven years in prison for defending his son?
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best, tax-deductible gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0rgk72aq1kfpg5g3auc1buevgaj464i4kbhjj80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3jm9or2cdh2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case. Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this.**Mark’s trial is set to begin on January 24th** , so we’re running out of time. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in** – ** by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziha8a1acfotk7utv2gjv1vla4q68utjf006jgjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3jm9or2cdh2bs)Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out.Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqnu01i3afuvilvr2vajp2lmrhrq4305nil6ddm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3jm9or2cdh2bs) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in sending your tax-deductible donations to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi6kgqm3es5rfts3itd3a6msrms4m1k3ilpcgrso_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3jm9or2cdh2bs) I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don’t hesitate!I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense fund of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2rv2pke4lhe27v34vuk7illnu7uq5m63rtcu6t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3jm9or2cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE
**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zegb07tfbsegmgee7ugqnusjg05k48jmm2a1flfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3jm9or2cdh2bs)
---

Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways.Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case. Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family. We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this.Mark’s trial is set to begin on January 24th , so we’re running out of time. no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out.Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don’t hesitate!I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. | | May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. body:

| | Dear Friend,I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best, tax-deductible gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zho47fr4q0fei6vtv8udicrhb65b6raq7u5qtcho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ge8ob4chh2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case. Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this.**Mark’s trial is set to begin on January 24th** , so we’re running out of time. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in** – ** by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z56gf085rcer1al3jgap70d6v6s8hqe47dhdqev0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ge8ob4chh2bs)Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out.Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl50iveddp3s82flk95oaonp7758ccqgk80rrds8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ge8ob4chh2bs) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in sending your tax-deductible donations to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqp1jm0patfc5g6v14er5sffpgegufftpsj7o3k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ge8ob4chh2bs) I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don’t hesitate!I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,

Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel

body:

###
---
| | [ A Candle in the Forest ](http://click1.srnemail.com/hfqfcwllcdszddplzssgvzmdjczhwjjdqwgpjqsbvmmbmh_nfkppttftyfknqprqjjpjww.html)
### _Friday, December 23, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, we continue the Christmas tradition with my reading of the wonderful story, A Candle in the Forest. It is a great time to slow down an remember what is truly important at this time of the year. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/yvsvkgppkwfnwwtpnffzsncwyknbgyywlgztylfqsccqcc_nfkppttftyfknqprqjjpjww.html)
---|---
| [ From BUDS to the Newsroom: My conversation with Carl Higbie ](http://click1.srnemail.com/spjpmkzzmgctgghztccdbtlgwmtskwwgrkdhwrcvbllvlp_nfkppttftyfknqprqjjpjww.html)
### _Wednesday, December 21, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I sit down with Newsmax personality Carl Higbie. Carl is a Navy Seal with multiple deployments in his career and has made a transition to the front of the camera as a regular host on Newsmax. Join me for a fun discussion over a wide range of topics. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/lnqhjnffjldrllcfrddymrqlsjrwnsslknycskdgmqqghz_nfkppttftyfknqprqjjpjww.html)
| [ The lessons from the Georgia Runoff and the 2022 Election Cycle. ](http://click1.srnemail.com/hwhfcwllcdszddplzssgvzmdjczhwjjdqwgpjqsbvmmbfv_nfkppttftyfknqprqjjpjww.html)
### _Monday, December 19, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I sit down with Chip Lake, Political Consultant, who worked the Georgia Senate runoff for a look behind the scenes to see what really happened and what it means for Republicans going forward. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/gttmrtjjrfkdffpjdkkhcdnfsrdltssfythpsykgcnngmy_nfkppttftyfknqprqjjpjww.html)

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Holiday Reflections
body:
Peter, I hope this email finds you well and in the holiday spirit. As we celebrate Christmas and Hanukkah, I want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a joyous season.
Peter, I hope this email finds you well and in the holiday spirit. As we celebrate Christmas and Hanukkah, I want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a joyous season. This is a time to come together with family and friends, celebrate, and give thanks for all we have. It is a time to reflect on the values that are important to us and be appreciative of the blessings in our lives.**I am truly grateful to represent such a wonderful community and honored to serve you in Congress. I pray the holiday season brings you and those you love peace, happiness, and all the joy this time of year has to offer.** As your Congressman-Elect, I wish you the very BEST this season.Sincerely,
Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-nhtxhy-iubikjttk-r/)
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhqpgk900erffhev443dos1n4gblsc5patv6dvio_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3geao30cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za5jdf22jg00alsdahatdbkcfoct85lkqrhavnj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3geao30cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z141sc16t5b06fkjqc80lh62gtktmdgi2ggt1gu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3geao30cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Great America Update
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7510%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Icwgsf3fXWNnGBH2BtS4SQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77429%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DbFdn1SJg446MznmJUbWiw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77420%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tl2R0mdVZNdl3Gf4LBuNdA&sysid=1)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77421%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b3IHT3fxDGWDiXk0TiX5OA&sysid=1)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77420%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tl2R0mdVZNdl3Gf4LBuNdA&sysid=1)**
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7510%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Icwgsf3fXWNnGBH2BtS4SQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7510%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Icwgsf3fXWNnGBH2BtS4SQ&sysid=1)

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: You Won a Battle!
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/KjXuIfWqH-6TWH2qY8UiPg)
---
| [ ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/V2FKJ513YHaQnMDPf6ryFQ)
---
| **Thank YOU for speaking out! **We sent out an email earlier this week alerting you of the $1.7 Trillion Pelosi-Schumer Omnibus spending bill that our two Mississippi Senators, Roger Wicker and Cindy Hyde-Smith, voted to advance for a final vote. A vote to advance a bill is a signal that they support the bill and plan to vote for the final version.There were 19 total Republicans that voted in the initial vote along with every Democrat in the Senate. But YOU spoke out. YOU used our action center to send over 1,000 emails to our Senators demanding them vote NO on the frivolous spending bill. Many of you also called the offices of the Senators to let them know of your disapproval of their vote. In the end, the bill passed with 18 Republicans betraying their party's principles and voting for the bill. This spending bill will lead to higher inflation and undoubtedly extend the economic recession we are currently facing. But there was one less Senator in the final vote than in the initial vote. That vote was Mississippi Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith. Because of YOU bombarding Hyde-Smith’s office, she ultimately switched her vote to a NO on final passage. Roger Wicker still voted with the Democrats, but the battle to save our country isn’t over. Wicker will face re-election in 2024 and the Mississippi Freedom Caucus will be sure to remind you of Wicker’s vote and his betrayal of your principles. His vote went against the voice of thousands of conservative Mississippians. Thank you again for speaking out and taking a stand. We may have lost this battle because of Wicker's betrayal, but we won a small victory by forcing Hyde-Smith to change her vote.
---
| | |
---
| [Click and Listen to Congressman Chip Roy](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/wtVtvivSYJDCjH0Un8k08A)
---
|

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaunn58h3ao31e1fofet4ehvf4hsv6kjbpu808bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ge6o72clh2bs) | #### [ NORAD Tracks Santa - You Can Too! Since 1955, the Continental Air Defense Command (CONAD) has tracked Santa. In 1958, NORAD replaced CONAD and took over the Santa tracking operations. NORAD has been tracking Santa every year since! On December 24, NORAD has one additional mission: that of tracking Santa Claus as he makes his way across the globe, delivering presents to children. This is NORAD’s 67th year tracking Santa and it’s a tradition the Command is proud to continue each year. READ MORE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2tlsuhfhtkmuod6dcbgu9aaed0rrqqcaosvmumg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ge6o72clh2bs)

name: American Defense News
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgqmn8mab6s22us6nlrdaqorefema6sd5slb45io_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ei3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0p73c8oj1pb1eorj3d5lc5q31pbke8p68o766qr30pr0c1ondd3kmpi3csr3murt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e9omcdj76kpmfdr1cor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdjm8o70sdge8o724no)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqbadkseujpqtq4kcghijdqgb814jkm5g3mv18bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ge6o74c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl3so6tvf8dvbeg8q2nrecqe4r8ekq42c9blb688_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ge6o74c3h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjs2viapr4p4u0nrpfn2eu2o74f67ejt44nblqp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ge6o74c3h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Your America
subject: It’s ready to ship to you
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7676%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=dODYqcc2tAb%2bgCgKcOF8bw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OZ1uNnmiS%2bKOYc%2bb0PIHVQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98173%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ic9iSJfJkT3Csw0UQCDG%2fw&sysid=1)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98174%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H4VzsF5BfyfL7C8HTdnAPg&sysid=1)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe

| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others? Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King” examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel. | | This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link: By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum. | | | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying “The David Story.” Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of “The David Story” while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty. Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below: If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Briefing
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z89lg6f6abv63m6a5mmm4c3me18q80aoh7q96hv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ie0ob6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoqjodkd0l2ap0gnqri1b052ctj2torc87u6l730_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ie0ob6cdh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty — the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlpd3s4iet5juh0hrs4ml64u38tekd1sh3j51m2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ie0ob6cdh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze6tcalnbbdg5i97uj384nauhko6nf1s79dt6i2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ie2o34clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhe3h9l025vfah1flr5f41ll4omd7ss5kfcokslo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ie2o34clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7g9eoc5ltr7292pbeuidtj3nhqh21d9rl2ojuqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ie2o34clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zr53o0q0la7gtllvg4rl7qoo5ojvu16bnhcjjodg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zirq9s16bvpkvm53imj2c7g56d137r670jmmu4f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ieao72clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onn6eq6ap75elib8pdj6li6ctb0eir60ppimarr2o3mmqobddj76uqrcslksipreduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74sb66pibad1nmth6ccdgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh0ovk1fptv2mfjs5o0chcenist5pqfspmflq7r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ieao72clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvm55bqqmbev63m8ok3h8oc843rda7l97ecd4158_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ieao72clh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7uqqvdql8foar23p8v3j58s70u54bmete6rt620_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ieao72clh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zut682t8o1uktus1v5p3lirlv18mpcgpddnsf7tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c3ieao72clh2bs)**

**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he'll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I'll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden's radicalism and BREAK the Establishment's stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won 't fight for us...so we've got to do it ourselves.**

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6bc843209ca487f84136a044c0d6310&_e=pQns3f8-1e9yQP51dRgkPN68bLUqsKIWNfagmAsL6ZYUCms1-UBBoI61m56r0vQVSUTAIbWUCbh50y23GY_3NQVoue2Qmqy7pVLJFi3yv8fun4eoVm7LIRhUCtb38jqZ44LFqRzM9I825mA-V3nhJGl9XSDYTPlgfV4Nha5ds4GvNs0Uei4CBkCzrH3rwYkJlQkdx6bcOhhWWk-M1bmOAtHd3J9irjEWPvQEVCa4Fp6ZG3gJaaE8JQ4GBICGg7lV54tf_Rl0vsMakADwazhAWpXaNQoTkTXGrqx9zRBZFGwg_o9JWQmPNCEdZvi7BsqRhvcsGSmTmXZ7z9oQkrl3nvuxZCVFYp8xSdOCGGRfFWf3WR6VSspMJhWTg2Q0Go6uzpD5CYl1eYPtTPr67b1g_g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6bc843209ca487f84136a044c0d6310&_e=pQns3f8-1e9yQP51dRgkPN68bLUqsKIWNfagmAsL6ZYUCms1-UBBoI61m56r0vQVSUTAIbWUCbh50y23GY_3NQVoue2Qmqy7pVLJFi3yv8fun4eoVm7LIRhUCtb38jqZ44LFqRzM9I825mA-V3nhJGl9XSDYTPlgfV4Nha5ds4GvNs0Uei4CBkCzrH3rwYkJlQkdx6bcOhhWWk-M1bmOAtHd3J9irjEWPvQEVCa4Fp6ZG3gJaaE8JQ4GBICGg7lVmLjLJFFUIAmK7MM_FBeAoprKrOwyNtH06UJryYay1U7S9ZNed0W3XWH3ifCBEkCCbU-IjgPJ-WSpiIoDwftj7oiIMLRjw-8TOykGL7vj-Kf0eUBs0vEEpe8zhIwEX1o34pS4PQGoVlrfL3qss4dtcg%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6bc843209ca487f84136a044c0d6310&_e=pQns3f8-1e9yQP51dRgkPN68bLUqsKIWNfagmAsL6ZYUCms1-UBBoI61m56r0vQVSUTAIbWUCbh50y23GY_3NQVoue2Qmqy7pVLJFi3yv8fun4eoVm7LIRhUCtb38jqZ44LFqRzM9I825mA-V3nhJGl9XSDYTPlgfV4Nha5ds4GvNs0Uei4CBkCzrH3rwYkJlQkdx6bcOhhWWk-M1bmOAtHd3J9irjEWPvQEVCa4Fp6ZG3gJaaE8JQ4GBICGg7lVUcsXQIGjK16gUt-auMTss1jclWYCayHJC6cEQAvpzCNKusv1g_m9kkUBhWusu3vi3-sETYhV2M7eNeWsWKBqoTM5g0giRpygE9sEV-KSR4yeoIcFtyMEry1xv7lcc7mpNKiQ7RJhzGvjQvX6O0LI1w%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ff7458884264de996710558f5aa3b43&_e=Fnr58RAeEUM2V7Ji8ZobCqVw4Svm5kCn97K_XjmbodHToBNARztPyv9V58Zu1Rf9K4shbSSPjij_kQQu_2kmfnNBXm3BDLIQIA_PnitDCk76ieKOaowx3Hw_zHe2nSt35ExmnWW2N_YfZPJTdOo42NI1Mj0CEXw-WFX4YXSHlm5vm0mooqWUHUgysuGFX8dhAYHlKmVzCfih5Wrp7LdcnchFQdKIxNpGDc8iQl9Knf8G6DuGjIt9qed6iwowOERld8YDyIGQ4c_VfmVezq3ZtMB3NctJyn4jxl2qoPcL4VRp7yc9S2vGI56EtNM1AUQA66wsnpPD3hl5jsTR5Xv5nYVOtGJr6OcvQC4nFxkChxcbv1u6-PA6vxuOhPx9wJUKoHuhjB8F801JLKKjAiVEnQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ff7458884264de996710558f5aa3b43&_e=Fnr58RAeEUM2V7Ji8ZobCqVw4Svm5kCn97K_XjmbodHToBNARztPyv9V58Zu1Rf9K4shbSSPjij_kQQu_2kmfnNBXm3BDLIQIA_PnitDCk76ieKOaowx3Hw_zHe2nSt35ExmnWW2N_YfZPJTdOo42NI1Mj0CEXw-WFX4YXSHlm5vm0mooqWUHUgysuGFX8dhAYHlKmVzCfih5Wrp7LdcnchFQdKIxNpGDc8iQl9Knf8lSV_YmEtrlP2d8T1bOJqHm5Nm9T7JyUtxhnizHmCp2tlqZOjQowN34Rc83SqrUOQ67x87x-RdmxD5TpaIy5UNxMDxEMN53DD7IRMzG_2gML9Y-sXCokTLM-RlwiqA3egEg5h1AnPg_tCvd6x9FHvAYWZ_PimnHldUlM7vvgvRlg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ff7458884264de996710558f5aa3b43&_e=Fnr58RAeEUM2V7Ji8ZobCqVw4Svm5kCn97K_XjmbodHToBNARztPyv9V58Zu1Rf9K4shbSSPjij_kQQu_2kmfnNBXm3BDLIQIA_PnitDCk76ieKOaowx3Hw_zHe2nSt35ExmnWW2N_YfZPJTdOo42NI1Mj0CEXw-WFX4YXSHlm5vm0mooqWUHUgysuGFX8dhAYHlKmVzCfih5Wrp7LdcnchFQdKIxNpGDc8iQl9Knf9MtZPnTRAgXYl9IPwmKjCjRHElUut7dbp4OB1dH0HLcFf9s54yiaSWpKcsUjeEiQ7v_G1wVImEV5_N0vcXOS44SFF5WB10efX2eZInk9SPvzrcSlyMaoNlZUvMlheZYctOZNpUEDwBdJ1tLccA4GwZhuLhO_i23Fh9iWHA3T00qQ%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a39d6a5ee2f4a28ba0ec6f7610d6e99&_e=PDYezqzgIvltvJZ6LeDWunadXvrQS8ko9L5GBlnk9gpBHVKYuodqdYCPldN0z047pmOnZgdi2UJZwwg2e3CqMiwUDNR4-BFP7fQFNvfkC6-B7nsrQEYePc5jpAis3poc88o5mKKLASnyY8C5AhTRO71zss8hV_czq61rbcCUXpo7gtRvbr0sbkb4AM_qv-bRbW-lLKRXVsO0toSERzh5hz0xifuiF-8PtCMHqeKYlwd_yJuJfkIEisQMVlhdgUVmVzS-SHqgYlWqUXYps9KQuJ8OietyRrlUl0qEDRp2ka4kPi7kedkuUO2T2JQ_fzAwJlxSFvoEBjVy09B52JmyoK8jDkwz38ANRshgF_SCpEirKqfvpbQ-pyD0kHXoJo4OmJ6BXPGr2JOhWrxgVB_Ztw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a39d6a5ee2f4a28ba0ec6f7610d6e99&_e=PDYezqzgIvltvJZ6LeDWunadXvrQS8ko9L5GBlnk9gpBHVKYuodqdYCPldN0z047pmOnZgdi2UJZwwg2e3CqMiwUDNR4-BFP7fQFNvfkC6-B7nsrQEYePc5jpAis3poc88o5mKKLASnyY8C5AhTRO71zss8hV_czq61rbcCUXpo7gtRvbr0sbkb4AM_qv-bRbW-lLKRXVsO0toSERzh5hz0xifuiF-8PtCMHqeKYlwd_yJuJfkIEisQMVlhdgUVmekoJwyQCddZV_infg21mzm3PnMjP4mqYmKjVRTln93FpKMyXLYySkXDuJQTR8sY7KVa9Wcx6tKMh1DoXpmB6O-yeT_JwPRSE6F6Kzm2troTGqIbWwIdHeaockOb-4-vzWjqZE7IR99edrQrWevnxdg%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a39d6a5ee2f4a28ba0ec6f7610d6e99&_e=PDYezqzgIvltvJZ6LeDWunadXvrQS8ko9L5GBlnk9gpBHVKYuodqdYCPldN0z047pmOnZgdi2UJZwwg2e3CqMiwUDNR4-BFP7fQFNvfkC6-B7nsrQEYePc5jpAis3poc88o5mKKLASnyY8C5AhTRO71zss8hV_czq61rbcCUXpo7gtRvbr0sbkb4AM_qv-bRbW-lLKRXVsO0toSERzh5hz0xifuiF-8PtCMHqeKYlwd_yJuJfkIEisQMVlhdgUVm29ym55qC4oPaDjrlmTzCSZyhf_rKeTxKOR0egRyfS6LobVI2Y-VulY-bKH9-n_OT-KsD5j37NUiWLqW616Aq2FkD5CzdXYhl7RunZfK5D4-TuXJA2xZjV0TFN_d6vTwC4Ce5W_JelfwGoUoFTIiI1Q%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0233%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=cauth%2f0QHbGM1w%2bHXKG%2b7g&sysid=1)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44675%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ciPEtXDJvod4UmjK7QniOQ&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44676%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gaUFIQtXDzXQUWPAoYObKQ&sysid=1)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44677%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1iafci4QqrH0wj4gBtmx9w&sysid=1)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44678%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yARCpEToTLxKTQT7TjaoTw&sysid=1)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44679%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=McihK8eWELeA3jEdRAoCpA&sysid=1)**

**[Just $30--or anything you can afford--will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44670%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WZN8wkmM%2fvO0yM341F%2br9Q&sysid=1)**
| | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44678%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yARCpEToTLxKTQT7TjaoTw&sysid=1)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $55](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44671%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xs3Zws6pJRr46oqhAY13Ww&sysid=1)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $80](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44672%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lJ%2bYdwn4joP8cZELolLpTA&sysid=1)
---
Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

McGalliard was a farmer, developer, and entrepreneur from New Jersey and in 1901 he planted the nation’s first Christmas tree farm. According to Hamilton Township historian Jeffery Guear, McGalliard planted a crop of 25,000 Norway spruce trees and 5,000 saplings in the village of White Horse, in Hamilton Township, that he purchased from Mr. Charles Black of Hightstown, New Jersey. It was all due to a rock-filled plot of land that McGalliard had that wouldn’t grow a traditional crop. That plot of land gave him the idea to try a different type of crop.
