name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7cc311986d5b490681536902ef8a2431&_e=HCt1k5lpw8Sx84sfskZiBtQqBgKSSrvMjSY_yH4qQB7x6y9_pp3-KW59CPiC2_cvB9QFiCWnyL2uyObukJGC_-BEx6UOUS6okyN43a4jeM3OKjWQ4EkBsFNEmSxMrNKVtUaD4c4ODgY7oOeoknsMuLqlMhyDzqPHM0Smx-gsinQECRomu3mF2SMd4W2bfjY8DSvg0lasoFQfHyrAF7azeUDRyEtFpifKyKq1Fmol_J_u6GF_Pev8uvMVStt8av7168vnlK4tDqkYA_gIuZYyc9sveqQIeqhmZ-Uns21UtWXcmyM4sjvG5eo3aXVnfxB8Yr3AzPGQIxZHe-l8rrSt6bGHCmA7r6Y2TtIiqi5CdaXJF6Ag1EGbhhoeKKxMCNcz5TpsxMh7ZisxFhoskTqybQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7cc311986d5b490681536902ef8a2431&_e=HCt1k5lpw8Sx84sfskZiBtQqBgKSSrvMjSY_yH4qQB7x6y9_pp3-KW59CPiC2_cvB9QFiCWnyL2uyObukJGC_-BEx6UOUS6okyN43a4jeM3OKjWQ4EkBsFNEmSxMrNKVtUaD4c4ODgY7oOeoknsMuLqlMhyDzqPHM0Smx-gsinQECRomu3mF2SMd4W2bfjY8DSvg0lasoFQfHyrAF7azeUDRyEtFpifKyKq1Fmol_J82R_0M4FOCcEDLI-8kE-Lc5EVvGetvkoEOqi5yTZdsKjfoDJaJN5Pg0Wl5S8F0Peouye_rRlsdCp7eW4Y9g6V5PoxU0cZncSl3kxnEeaOdl0lCnQJe0RL6X3FMKuop7EK6631hl5kMn6PQ4K0RW5r2QdB7lV1ff6l7Xulu6uFp1A%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7cc311986d5b490681536902ef8a2431&_e=HCt1k5lpw8Sx84sfskZiBtQqBgKSSrvMjSY_yH4qQB7x6y9_pp3-KW59CPiC2_cvB9QFiCWnyL2uyObukJGC_-BEx6UOUS6okyN43a4jeM3OKjWQ4EkBsFNEmSxMrNKVtUaD4c4ODgY7oOeoknsMuLqlMhyDzqPHM0Smx-gsinQECRomu3mF2SMd4W2bfjY8DSvg0lasoFQfHyrAF7azeUDRyEtFpifKyKq1Fmol_J8srHTyFSDHAg1ZQjqXT8l9TR0a2db-Fd63L--81xV-25sKXumank2TMBMYTWFHNicTUdWt5AmE2cmndPFXFU78PpGeWI7J3kH0PaDLM97BPrlvuvlj1EYBW4o4d5fzW69f3-5h6GuaC48IyTqRKQwr73iQvOGf3znjq26ampCkhw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Just in time for Christmas
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62117051:JCgBuIGNb:m:1:3331421248:0C0D9F3F76F9C8C7C1CEBDDBA2A5F629:r)
---
Peter, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62117051:JCgBuIGNb:m:1:3331421248:0C0D9F3F76F9C8C7C1CEBDDBA2A5F629:r)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62117051:JCgBuIGNb:m:1:3331421248:0C0D9F3F76F9C8C7C1CEBDDBA2A5F629:r)
---
[Get my book](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62117051:JCgBuIGNb:m:1:3331421248:0C0D9F3F76F9C8C7C1CEBDDBA2A5F629:r)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62117051:JCgBuIGNb:m:1:3331421248:0C0D9F3F76F9C8C7C1CEBDDBA2A5F629:r) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62117051:JCgBuIGNb:m:1:3331421248:0C0D9F3F76F9C8C7C1CEBDDBA2A5F629:r)
---
[Get my book](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62117051:JCgBuIGNb:m:1:3331421248:0C0D9F3F76F9C8C7C1CEBDDBA2A5F629:r)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62117051:JCgBuIGNb:m:1:3331421248:0C0D9F3F76F9C8C7C1CEBDDBA2A5F629:r)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62117051:JCgBuIGNb:m:1:3331421248:0C0D9F3F76F9C8C7C1CEBDDBA2A5F629:r)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Cal=20Wells?=
subject: Merry Christmas – and some great news!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132712?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Merry Christmas from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy!**

As Chairman of the Board, I wanted to share with you some wonderful end of the year news. Almost exactly two years ago, Douglas Carswell joined us from the UK as our new President and CEO. He came for what was intended to be a three-year term until the end of 2023, and we knew we were very fortunate to have him come to Mississippi and serve as our President and CEO.

**I am delighted to announce that Douglas has agreed to extend an additional two years so that he and his family will be with us at least until the end of 2025. **

Douglas is really committed to Mississippi and to the liberty movement**. In the past two years, we have already started to see a shift in policy direction toward lower taxes and less government regulation. Our policy wins have been recognized with a number of national awards. **

Douglas has built a high profile in the media both here in Mississippi and on national news outlets as well. Under his direction, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy has had a fabulous year, helping drive tax cuts, removing excessive regulation, and encouraging the next generation of young Mississippians through the Mississippi Leadership Academy.

**It is a measure of how well the Carswell family has settled into life in Mississippi as they have recently purchased a new home in Flowood.** Thanks to all of you who have welcomed them to Mississippi. Our Board is committed to keep Douglas in Mississippi as long as possible as he has brought great changes to our state, and he is just getting started.

I have included highlights of the past year and would encourage you to continue your support of Douglas with a year-end gift to the Mississippi Center for Public Policy.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3708befa7f&e=5703353baa)
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d872fbffbb&e=5703353baa)
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0d07c3f909&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Sincerely,

T. Calvin Wells
Chairman of the Board
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, Merry Christmas from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy! As Chairman of the Board, I wanted to share with you some wonderful end of the year news. Almost exactly two years ago, Douglas Carswell joined us from the UK as our new President and CEO. He came for what was intended to be a three-year term until the end of 2023, and we knew we were very fortunate to have him come to Mississippi and serve as our President and CEO. I am delighted to announce that Douglas has agreed to extend an additional two years so that he and his family will be with us at least until the end of 2025. Douglas is really committed to Mississippi and to the liberty movement. In the past two years, we have already started to see a shift in policy direction toward lower taxes and less government regulation. Our policy wins have been recognized with a number of national awards. Douglas has built a high profile in the media both here in Mississippi and on national news outlets as well. Under his direction, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy has had a fabulous year, helping drive tax cuts, removing excessive regulation, and encouraging the next generation of young Mississippians through the Mississippi Leadership Academy. It is a measure of how well the Carswell family has settled into life in Mississippi as they have recently purchased a new home in Flowood. Thanks to all of you who have welcomed them to Mississippi. Our Board is committed to keep Douglas in Mississippi as long as possible as he has brought great changes to our state, and he is just getting started. I have included highlights of the past year and would encourage you to continue your support of Douglas with a year-end gift to the Mississippi Center for Public Policy. | | | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Sincerely, T. Calvin Wells Chairman of the Board | | |

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Restoring hope in our country

You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl1lerud4oivps9nn6bsrogg4cvnpfp9ajghv0ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsbb37bl099bspmkio6631vlshu6ri550is6knoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6c3h2bs)****[”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp9uge81jq49c7ej60upvre234v67b7k27t67g1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6c3h2bs)[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh59untrpeabe81iu99v30vrdahnqemm0kdtqo3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6c3h2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9276lg3megt9qv15vut2tiv0pkmg5c55rq8no3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6c3h2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zej7kdnc3r8b0fk9j53llfgamcdunsae7d8j2d78_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6c3h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrf9n2s39h200uv1u6vvtnpdui5oo7vig9t56u9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6cth2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgjp5vnugrsarklfa78219k73qare11i7co1cqpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6cth2bs) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdhao8o240ibt5jt4r4jiv1qntijatk9no30ivo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6cth2bs)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0829k0gv9lcn3sria08pfoaijp2510orukg2cbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6cth2bs)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1i0f17ekjftkdh4ii3amtagdv8gfu3mauundeu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6cth2bs)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr0vvgcf7mekn5q5ai6j1ghk1f1lhnqrf27c3uvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjg61ob6cth2bs)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

clean_body: As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. | | | | | Fellow Patriot, This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. So before you close out this email, This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America. This special pledge reads: I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters. The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight. You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below: I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional. May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays. Peter, as Christmas nears and we look back on another year, I want to wish you a very merry...| | | [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=26ebabab115d4ec8958b4913eba6ec0c&_e=o9fvjvR5OVjVC1Gbt4CtwQZLESq-yoxYRilvDie5zVrMicLrepnspW8RYLGarl45SGTanu6U6HCWK6h8IvT-sf_GHKRmxCeLz8TyG_P1b-9eZeltJVCzRVCRV6ITHxbgYlQiflbOXT3vXCAxwBVZG9nOYUmessQxfsLmvI1BJp63sjP0mcHxH7lWGVtTtiCawbsb-Ao_wGbIp0qH0Fsywg%3D%3D)

| | Peter, As we look back on 2022 and look forward to Christmas and the New Year, we want to thank you for another year of support, friendship, and kindness.
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=26ebabab115d4ec8958b4913eba6ec0c&_e=o9fvjvR5OVjVC1Gbt4CtwQZLESq-yoxYRilvDie5zVrMicLrepnspW8RYLGarl45yqOz2TaEVnHil1vbE3QA3N6RZCr-ugSDw6vUiGi5I4YfDVmHndTueG0G2wqOnXAOmL7GE5zoKcvR6olrT7Ic1ZAyuTvWRIdZpm8Kco9V9cEkbMtLsQ6dekzPrU8X8sJK1hcGG_Az95CeKH8VBE5vVA%3D%3D)
---
Northeast Wisconsin is an incredible place to live, work, and raise a family because people like you are passionately committed to making it better, one day at a time. From the bottom of our hearts, thank you for all that you’ve done this year to make that happen. We wish you and your loved ones a very merry Christmas and a happy New Year filled with joy, peace, and endless blessings. Merry Christmas,Mike, Anne, Grace, and Rose

card will close tomorrow at midnight
| | Listen, it is the Biden Family’s second holiday season in the White House as President and First Lady.

After the midterm elections, we think a happy holiday season is exactly what the Biden Family needs — and we want to make sure it is one to remember!

_We know this card will go VIRAL!_ So if you want to reserve your spot, we need you to sign in the next HOUR! **[⇩ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THEIR HOLIDAY CARD NOW⇩](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20221224_EMCARD_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=5916%2E878179%2EpJRiO5)** | [**ADD MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20221224_EMCARD_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=5916%2E878179%2EpJRiO5)

Look, President Biden and his family have done SO much since they moved into the White House in 2021\.

So we want to make sure they know how much we appreciate them — **_and we know your signature will mean the world to them!_**
**[Don’t miss your chance, our card will close tomorrow at MIDNIGHT!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20221224_EMCARD_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=5916%2E878179%2EpJRiO5)**

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5916%2E878179%2EpJRiO5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5916%2E878179%2EpJRiO5).**

| | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Friend.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2788671824aa43dbbc01bf887943cb2e&_e=CL64EWlePhwebt_tswC6nUWYjV5m2Kip_qPoFhV7a2FLPsKRqhAQaQCLD4bT5PA4zoAG9olfllPqUnfBFsyk4OF4MUQnZz2diL9Xsu2H6TFPROB88aqF_32UrayISwWug-fAW62WYZR7zPIqeaUWLlZhHw_u-303Nft__6B27Fn03EoZxtMe482Y3z7MFW8hGhCAeFyIK9hKQTLeIpENKSJV8GjjeUzz1RG4t_2X-Ugi4n0tXEPg1RRzbas3-Xr5n9qDXxSJ4aBOK-x75BldCS1Xd1MDTPqc2rR7bDNKsd6JiXEtVustE7UnMgMuwykO4-A1vt3yvsIljtvO9sKCNO3J6Lki-zWCJbgcQ66w3ZnazzSuONn_KC5dp10-zW7jJKAIgtHwmIAugkArWs0fVHQ4eUHN8FiSE11gcEkDoxtZTrcqFkZsD6OTwKRxLLbY "Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!")**_

body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=17c89bb0c61c4f9389a0297c8913f2a1&_e=WHCjhICYZODeVXMZFRPX_36GCV7z8Rh9eSPaHO9IcY1SejrTt773x-VR6pnM5Xfl80xCaiZcUe1uCBsrNZsVumGaMkYqSmr9vNTRbnWNV56HZbbUcjVTgWByIAGPUEWV5SZ6hxevc7uk3B1MvqrhV0ldbtCSnbumvTHYlg_OvW3osDmhL93OmQApB1mmz3sw4qEoDu-ob1G6Gvc36PyoxWM0jJD2OsJA5a2H11iNqz9qFZIs0Iw2EyiFts1q-sCn9IFZ_mCclQTyBtit0RLsRH18iGmlONK_PkuCSI7tmZCOEFIi-PqB9sZj-IVjiiPK)

| Fellow Patriot, **I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.** If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=17c89bb0c61c4f9389a0297c8913f2a1&_e=WHCjhICYZODeVXMZFRPX_36GCV7z8Rh9eSPaHO9IcY1SejrTt773x-VR6pnM5Xfl80xCaiZcUe1uCBsrNZsVumGaMkYqSmr9vNTRbnWNV56HZbbUcjVTgWByIAGPUEWV5SZ6hxevc7uk3B1MvqrhV0ldbtCSnbumvTHYlg_OvW1DHp4DGqeBik4m4jj_Jh5SiYYuVBk_Croo4-D6JV2SZY6xITuT0OV_newCDmXoeGb-PDsYxW16dMdKc5Ay6vB95TB-eLVX5HWvof_mA8PpAZVxLIETvwK-KkW9LJT0yg0v-XhM9fVM_-xInDnIqj60)** My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. **[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=17c89bb0c61c4f9389a0297c8913f2a1&_e=WHCjhICYZODeVXMZFRPX_36GCV7z8Rh9eSPaHO9IcY1SejrTt773x-VR6pnM5Xfl80xCaiZcUe1uCBsrNZsVumGaMkYqSmr9vNTRbnWNV56HZbbUcjVTgWByIAGPUEWV5SZ6hxevc7uk3B1MvqrhV0ldbtCSnbumvTHYlg_OvW1j6p0QSlfsCmomz5EGybHaSpBaOf2HeZFIp0vi_icb7dlCHRlJGb7nZFrIirQ8gWdypPHGc60X6KkzqVNZ2TS3YNUouZr-a5uO2QQbpFLk-Y7VV7sWhBWnVEtRlzZSpMKFIva8aLZI3x4uesijK-VU)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=17c89bb0c61c4f9389a0297c8913f2a1&_e=WHCjhICYZODeVXMZFRPX_36GCV7z8Rh9eSPaHO9IcY1SejrTt773x-VR6pnM5Xfl80xCaiZcUe1uCBsrNZsVumGaMkYqSmr9vNTRbnWNV56HZbbUcjVTgWByIAGPUEWV5SZ6hxevc7uk3B1MvqrhV0ldbtCSnbumvTHYlg_OvW085sIhPnj8zqYyuO0CQIyI2pzJkxCgLlsqpJK446ke63y6f12qukeKl1nlakxcWqiUAV5xJphqJ2mnGkxLA_N2n4X5P5Lx-l59-TXVgaN--dKs-jIl8VutieyEjy6VYxM20kvx11jo1jfOyaC6BCn3)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=17c89bb0c61c4f9389a0297c8913f2a1&_e=WHCjhICYZODeVXMZFRPX_36GCV7z8Rh9eSPaHO9IcY1SejrTt773x-VR6pnM5Xfl80xCaiZcUe1uCBsrNZsVumGaMkYqSmr9vNTRbnWNV56HZbbUcjVTgWByIAGPUEWV5SZ6hxevc7uk3B1MvqrhV0ldbtCSnbumvTHYlg_OvW3TISf7GCkPrdU1FdTZSyHrYQ3komyy-EFOhrN4cNEytgWi2qs_1FP3SUfKHH94U58Lf8lQU_nN92n__9hM59kAqipKSw00rnaBqwRCGNgPn_RuNHHb_vDzUiI51tnGKPS5k-T1KDmtqPDz6mE_U78L)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
May your holiday be full of joy and family!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Katie Britt
subject: From my family to yours…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Merry Christmas, Peter!

Peter,

Before Santa’s arrival tonight, I wanted to take a moment to wish a very Merry
Christmas to you & your family.

As we reflect on the words found in John 3:16 and give thanks to God,
Christmas is also a time for celebrating with loved ones, spreading joy and
cheer, and reflecting on the blessings we’ve received throughout the year.

For me, there’s one ‘blessing’ that I needed to thank directly: you.

I’m so grateful for all of your support over this past year, and I’m excited
to begin my journey as your Senator in the new year.

As 2022 draws to an end, I am filled with hope and determination for the work
that lies ahead.

Thank you again for your support and for believing in me. May your holiday
season be filled with peace and joy.

Warm Wishes,

Katie Britt
U.S. Senator-Elect from Alabama

Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

subject: Merry Christmas!

body:
The Hope Of Christmas | | | |

# **Newsletter-December Vol. 2, #39**
---
| | | 24December22

Dear Friends, **Merry Christmas!** 10 But the angel said to them, “Do not be afraid;
for behold, I bring you good news of great joy which will be for all the people;
11 for today in the city of David there has been born for you a Savior,
who is Christ the Lord.
Luke 2:10-11, NASB At Christmas, people all over the world pause to remember the birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ. Christmas celebrations have occurred throughout history despite difficulties faced at the time. Our presidents have reminded Americans of how Jesus' birth continues to impact the world.

For example, in the midst of World War II, President Franklin Roosevelt [reminded](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=0d6f2a488d&e=12a37459a2) the nation of the reasons Jesus' message has endured:
It is because the spirit of unselfish service personified by the life and the teachings of Christ makes appeal to the inner conscience and hope of every man and every woman in every part of the earth. It transcends in the ultimate all lines of race, of habitat, of nation. It lives in the midst of war, of slavery, of conquest. It survives prohibitions and decrees and force. It is an unquenchable Spring of Promise to humanity.

President Harry Truman acknowledged the reason for Christmas when he [told Americans](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=6bca5f4b6f&e=12a37459a2) on Christmas Eve of 1952:
[W]e remember another night long ago. Then a Child was born in a stable. A star hovered over, drawing wise men from afar. Shepherds, in a field, heard angels singing: "Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men." That was the first Christmas and it was God's great gift to us. This is a wonderful story. Year after year it brings peace and tranquility to troubled hearts in a troubled world. And tonight the earth seems hushed, as we turn to the old, old story of how "God so loved the world, that He gave His only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in Him should not perish, but have everlasting life."

President Ronald Reagan shared Truman's sentiment when he [said](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=a6b98a6a87&e=12a37459a2):
An angel of the Lord appeared to them [shepherds] and said: "Fear not: for, behold, I bring you good tidings of great joy, which shall be to all people. For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, which is Christ the Lord." Suddenly there was with the angel a multitude of voices praising the Heavenly Father and singing: "Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men." Sometimes, in the hustle and bustle of holiday preparations we forget that the true meaning of Christmas was given to us by the angelic host that holy night long ago. Christmas is the commemoration of the birth of the Prince of Peace, Jesus Christ, whose message would truly be one of good tidings and great joy, peace and good will.

As we gather with family and exchange gifts, take time to read the Christmas story (Luke 2:1-20) and remember the True reason for this Christmas season. From all of us to all of you, Merry Christmas!
(Reprinted from WallBuilders.com) Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff

subject: Happy Holidays, Peter

body:
We hope you enjoy this holiday season ❄️❤️ | | | Hi Peter, We know the winter holidays are in full swing and we want to pop in your inbox quickly to wish you a wonderful holiday season! It’s the most wonderful time of the year to be with loved ones and relax. After a busy year with ten of thousands of miles traveled to help elect rural Democrats, we’re certainly grateful for the time to unwind and recenter before 2023 starts. **To everyone who’s supported our work and mission this year, thank you. We couldn’t have done it all without you, Peter.** Before we sign off, we just _have_ to share Joe’s new favorite Christmas sweater! Nothing is Fetter(man) than a warm, cozy sweater. We’re honored the Senator-Elect said this about URD: _“United Rural Democrats was one of the first organizations to get behind my campaign, and drove necessary resources to our campaign. Their mission to restore focus on small town America is one we should all get behind and support.”_ \- Senator-Elect John Fetterman [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gcg4is1rsYBM2hgoAr86mZiCROA6LrUzD5L9puNf4IX3H31n41o66ctojfXJF0ZLt5iD7v1pmhkp4isKSStJUoYh0RX_Z0aZPpvMnUSUYjor-I_RQEqvh6Wm79yBr68AYGSI5FRWdFeqhEbvb3IfTDY2CyAC9SkpEmy0-c8ps9M7Gauz_YyImk9hz2elfhA2xJx5yF8UEzBH79IZvn6yZSmRNlAetuxQpuWoJ6Rhz99eJaYSmXS5YmIVI4y0jp9WLd1kNVpr4u1czMLAQGY0IHAXPTEaPlYUciwZ-lDwq-mP5nF1dPMp24o_IBzVyAmI0gJxBctHFlKsWdIisMyb6oViDS9hYwx6Cwdyoit-XLoLc/3s9/-h5-IfvgQZaEB02rz9GlOA/h0/-2pF8keaX_YGFO-qitcb4UH0j0kZJP3vFnGVKz5qS_8) Now, put down your phone or close your laptop and go enjoy the last few days of 2022! Warmest wishes, United Rural Democrats

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Wishing you the happiest of holidays
body:
I’m so grateful you’re part of our team. |
---

| | | | As the year draws to a close, I’m sending you warm wishes for a joyous and peaceful holiday season. This year has provided many reasons to celebrate as well as many challenges. Even during setbacks and hardships, there is so much to be grateful for and to look forward to in the new year. And that is what I am thinking about today.
---

name: Full Mag News
subject: The Great Reset and American liberty
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8880309445e4d0c88df6cf723ca4952&_e=C5d2OXc2TellA7f1rt3mmLNVDRrKLeBDB6WmkT-jHT1jsYMuQ-vdbqr9G6g-k8WTziyYk_cRXHbIZXL0npLqod2URXBUfvCNHxdlHxCEiYElGlNZgigAHINFgGLxU5PDyJCOVERqRkiMKQVAsSFAytjaUQljlp7OedRofTh5RIWSH_l8sKc1wpa7C-lmg80xeW7EXkLPK6RXOWLFOk77etMOWjLHC6P0qz1wY5XCzuSfWeWE3sWwNeW25pVxHst3FcGG9IVOgtf8y72CZRdUFjldAhVKn1PTWqv3-qUkDPTf0-JNjIFYPUq8zY89Arn7x_stTRFqwgz8y3Grh1hnKmKfoCFIXSxoizMxOTDqyDf66t8C06fShGjhPLmLWfw7)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Does America need a "Great Reset?"
In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.
As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life.
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.
**This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8880309445e4d0c88df6cf723ca4952&_e=C5d2OXc2TellA7f1rt3mmLNVDRrKLeBDB6WmkT-jHT1jsYMuQ-vdbqr9G6g-k8WTziyYk_cRXHbIZXL0npLqod2URXBUfvCNHxdlHxCEiYElGlNZgigAHINFgGLxU5PDyJCOVERqRkiMKQVAsSFAytjaUQljlp7OedRofTh5RIWSH_l8sKc1wpa7C-lmg80xeW7EXkLPK6RXOWLFOk77etMOWjLHC6P0qz1wY5XCzuQyu0-1Wvu5wAikv2L5pGEP-aNWY5iLArDGbX7xlWkAJpMk2NmKTudk0wFKV4IwuARw-y5SNu3klr12DZ93mvRRn-C_F3npGAAKYDKUByyB1sIY-w-twtCErP5KuGkWDtdwMLZWRHmYwjxdr_CDcm8s)****["](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8880309445e4d0c88df6cf723ca4952&_e=C5d2OXc2TellA7f1rt3mmLNVDRrKLeBDB6WmkT-jHT1jsYMuQ-vdbqr9G6g-k8WTziyYk_cRXHbIZXL0npLqod2URXBUfvCNHxdlHxCEiYElGlNZgigAHINFgGLxU5PDyJCOVERqRkiMKQVAsSFAytjaUQljlp7OedRofTh5RIWSH_l8sKc1wpa7C-lmg80xeW7EXkLPK6RXOWLFOk77etMOWjLHC6P0qz1wY5XCzuSHXhEGMFV7KnqwKxYyLOt7DqRbX2I5rGlEatADzw4Te_RHQkXq1hc3Nig1YOUeeqWpyGnECM0LpvAtNYHE2OHe3bhESMzdGQ2M0gpQTojoO0Zio6GQ6Ehkj25ui437s98HGjRiSjiiBGvNmy6O3zrY) --is now available as a free online video series.**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bfe93016885443b844fd605285bf272&_e=N_2mMdjHp_zH1rqM2w6daruCYH61Dm6yAyGwKGPz3lKaLl1kcAVGZHWw52Nx1gW_p1u5W_s0z_VvpeNdUyBQnKlmoZglRbxgNAfNbHtlodEHq6g_xgQdxCncLxhQ0O6nvELIoy1yKN9FbAf0zIXQb9J4eh1P6nul7fKjUvCuH72fLE2zXrJEesp4cuFEQMyudL4gthEvwf_sdOhun2CnCIs9KfT0qmnwildwpdGCi6NuBqoc_GDv0wHUH1ZYhOq-xT7K2onYnc1Yv3WNatmFbApA6vS3MXpKQwOeeOf1fUNoKYBM5v640LwCENc5b3pyDh5xHrJouUxwK5wICM2yfSdafPMAtCxqdMuPTSkcFvHSQHO4ZGilI50FcMIDLmMG)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bfe93016885443b844fd605285bf272&_e=N_2mMdjHp_zH1rqM2w6daruCYH61Dm6yAyGwKGPz3lKaLl1kcAVGZHWw52Nx1gW_p1u5W_s0z_VvpeNdUyBQnKlmoZglRbxgNAfNbHtlodEHq6g_xgQdxCncLxhQ0O6nvELIoy1yKN9FbAf0zIXQb9J4eh1P6nul7fKjUvCuH72fLE2zXrJEesp4cuFEQMyudL4gthEvwf_sdOhun2CnCIs9KfT0qmnwildwpdGCi6PKiaFZrJFjv0pkxByhuaHhBb2jHZFtJpLP8kibAUZjra9GHQE9URf71fXsedwipNR-0XleLHJTH9ZeTn4Ai0m8Qi0FKQ_hIsdcJbDovQLjHa3LoBbqqoWsMYgpUmkUBFljzYvbOqlzfg7-ucOMlAJ4) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bfe93016885443b844fd605285bf272&_e=N_2mMdjHp_zH1rqM2w6daruCYH61Dm6yAyGwKGPz3lKaLl1kcAVGZHWw52Nx1gW_p1u5W_s0z_VvpeNdUyBQnKlmoZglRbxgNAfNbHtlodEHq6g_xgQdxCncLxhQ0O6nvELIoy1yKN9FbAf0zIXQb9J4eh1P6nul7fKjUvCuH72fLE2zXrJEesp4cuFEQMyudL4gthEvwf_sdOhun2CnCIs9KfT0qmnwildwpdGCi6MD3odoXeeDfRGbPYixf8EeE0504FMU68QiuuqWRF0itGDgrQKeHGQjzDBZp6YzzWCqszV6uVSpJpp9caUFNNhKJLWRTXxVyXiCYqUe80GB8ks1JWk2cABkvwMUfRpF1a51fremy7Hrk40fXwRdrqjS)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bfe93016885443b844fd605285bf272&_e=N_2mMdjHp_zH1rqM2w6daruCYH61Dm6yAyGwKGPz3lKaLl1kcAVGZHWw52Nx1gW_p1u5W_s0z_VvpeNdUyBQnKlmoZglRbxgNAfNbHtlodEHq6g_xgQdxCncLxhQ0O6nvELIoy1yKN9FbAf0zIXQb9J4eh1P6nul7fKjUvCuH72fLE2zXrJEesp4cuFEQMyudL4gthEvwf_sdOhun2CnCIs9KfT0qmnwildwpdGCi6OnfY5HTEbj1Zhu0pkji2n1A47FakL5oED6vFpIq0xOcd1CnhmXhLbqFPMCmZ9uVlGFzO2N82WIhY1BhN6SKWOHh1VZ88WAuXUv7oSPtfpk6gBVw_CkF5vX6XfCyXYnJ0rA-dvm2MNziXoMJqNl1aMC)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bfe93016885443b844fd605285bf272&_e=N_2mMdjHp_zH1rqM2w6daruCYH61Dm6yAyGwKGPz3lKaLl1kcAVGZHWw52Nx1gW_p1u5W_s0z_VvpeNdUyBQnKlmoZglRbxgNAfNbHtlodEHq6g_xgQdxCncLxhQ0O6nvELIoy1yKN9FbAf0zIXQb9J4eh1P6nul7fKjUvCuH72fLE2zXrJEesp4cuFEQMyudL4gthEvwf_sdOhun2CnCIs9KfT0qmnwildwpdGCi6N3uFTrtx7akJdQSwJbs7cVUqL-fKR9pw7ZFL71x-l0KQFPu-zove0VEMMe00rxASrfOHacyy04-QCzZ2aSpgxiTAFoLbGGl9w-9CLOcDWMVIqKkhz_ktz2ExO7XOK9zDOn3Xg7jMLUbEuh-4Hb-Bkh)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bfe93016885443b844fd605285bf272&_e=N_2mMdjHp_zH1rqM2w6daruCYH61Dm6yAyGwKGPz3lKaLl1kcAVGZHWw52Nx1gW_p1u5W_s0z_VvpeNdUyBQnKlmoZglRbxgNAfNbHtlodEHq6g_xgQdxCncLxhQ0O6nvELIoy1yKN9FbAf0zIXQb9J4eh1P6nul7fKjUvCuH72fLE2zXrJEesp4cuFEQMyudL4gthEvwf_sdOhun2CnCIs9KfT0qmnwildwpdGCi6NRhl8oU0Ts5Pf-mAeeI863ZdsGix_YNP0dQ6-L_Auk6tMFnG9sdys-fJNrpYcIX3feMwbqH3I4dfwPR1JszV3d03iOQstZwEs6YJFsbYXINFHsVcbChv-HFG98CPEOxiJ-khXoN9cq5aAaprhmlGay)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
Our Fight Continues!

| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_fight_continues&n=1)
---
## MERRY CHRISTMAS!
Friend, MERRY CHRISTMAS! I hope you enjoy this Christmas weekend with family and friends. The older I get, the more I realize that being with loved ones is the most important thing in life. But that doesn't mean our battles to protect your liberty isn't also important. Democrats are going to be in full control of Minnesota's government in two weeks. **And we know their agenda:** **\- Child vaccine mandates** **\- Spending YOUR surplus money** **\- Taking YOUR guns** **\- Forcing energy mandates that will increase your energy costs** Our team at Action 4 Liberty will be spending time with our loved ones this weekend. But we'll be back in the trenches next week, ready to go. We REFUSE to let the globalist, politically connected, elitists destroy this state and this country!!! Our fight to protect liberty continues on. Merry Christmas!
## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_fight_continues&n=2 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_fight_continues&n=2)
---

name: League of Conservation Voters
subject: Happy Holidays!
body:
Join us on September 22nd? ? ? ? ? i https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ypTVbbyeJ6/ZW0rVk1mUUJ5YUwxTWNRNGorV0M2MFpsVUVzNnFkOU50NFdHYkUzMDNPeXgxUmdyZVlXQ3VQT243eGN5d0RlSk5zQnVQbFd4V1lUYWFVRFlXVSsxdGN2aFFWcnlIemdOSVlTRGpma1ZNelU9S0/MzdSYllUY1NQN3VEMFA1QnQ0cWhscmREbzB2MWNObGhrRjdxaVdRNXZreHRvYWYyeGh5dnpPeStrSWJrVVNycDZkL0V4aHV0ek9jWU5aVktZbXNWMWNSWGF3UmV1RW5CS0
Dear Peter,

As natural disasters like wildfires, hurricanes, floods, and draughts continue to escalate year over year, including Hurricane Ida, which the Washington Post recently called "the poster child for a climate change-driven disaster", the health and safety of our communities is at risk and people are suffering ? especially Black and Indigenous communities, communities of color, and low-wealth communities who are already being disproportionately harmed and displaced.

However bleak the future may seem, I'm here to tell you ? there is hope.

The most important climate legislation in a generation is being debated as you read this, Peter.

Up for consideration in both the U.S. House and Senate is a bill that would put serious resources into clean energy. Funding for clean water. Clean air. Public lands. Environmental justice. There's a shot ? a real shot ? at passage.

Our movement is fighting every day for our Earth, and we are making real progress. The pro-environment majority in Congress and pro-climate leaders in the Biden-Harris administration have a chance to enact impactful legislation for a clean energy economy, investments in environmental justice, and thousands of good-paying, union jobs.

But this fight won't be over in a year, or even 5 years. At LCV, we're planning for the long-haul which is why we're bringing together our entire movement for an informative, inspiring, one-of-a-kind event later this month ? LCV's Climate Action Watch Party.

Want to get access to unique advocacy resources, up-to-the-minute insider information, and hear from the most important environmental leaders of our time? Register today ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/7RYwsNVVL~Q0/ZW0rVk1mUUJ5YUwxTWNRNGorV0M2MFpsVUVzNnFkOU50NFdHYkUzMDNPeXgxUmdyZVlXQ3VQT243eGN5d0RlSk5zQnVQbFd4V1lUYWFVRFlXVSsxdGN2aFFWcnlIemdOSVlTRGpma1ZNelU9S0/MzdSYllUY1NQN3VEMFA1QnQ0cWhscmREbzB2MWNObGhrRjdxaVdRNXZreHRvYWYyeGh5dnpPeStrSWJrVVNycDZkL0V4aHV0ek9jWU5aVktZbXNWMWNSWGF3UmV1RW5CS0

https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9WWpKJV/ZW0rVk1mUUJ5YUwxTWNRNGorV0M2MFpsVUVzNnFkOU50NFdHYkUzMDNPeXgxUmdyZVlXQ3VQT243eGN5d0RlSk5zQnVQbFd4V1lUYWFVRFlXVSsxdGN2aFFWcnlIemdOSVlTRGpma1ZNelU9S0/
What is LCV's Climate Action Watch Party you might be asking? On Wednesday, September 22, 2021 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C3zzP-CY/ZW0rVk1mUUJ5YUwxTWNRNGorV0M2MFpsVUVzNnFkOU50NFdHYkUzMDNPeXgxUmdyZVlXQ3VQT243eGN5d0RlSk5zQnVQbFd4V1lUYWFVRFlXVSsxdGN2aFFWcnlIemdOSVlTRGpma1ZNelU9S0/MzdSYllUY1NQN3VEMFA1QnQ0cWhscmREbzB2MWNObGhrRjdxaVdRNXZreHRvYWYyeGh5dnpPeStrSWJrVVNycDZkL0V4aHV0ek9jWU5aVktZbXNWMWNSWGF3UmV1RW5CS0 we are bringing our community of thousands of members together to hear from climate champions from across the movement and get plugged into our plan for climate action.

Ticket sales will go directly to our field campaigns, but also grant you entrance to one of our biggest events of the year, where you can hear from Senator Catherine Cortez Masto, Representative Lisa Blunt Rochester, and more to be announced!

Our movement is fighting every day to protect our planet and everyone who inhabits it, and we are making real progress. There's a real chance to enact impactful legislation for a clean energy economy, investments in environmental justice, and thousands of good-paying, unionized jobs.

If everyone reading this joins, we will be able to ensure our organizers have what they need to reach every voter and community leader where it matters most. Your continued support helps keep organizers knocking on doors and ads airing across channels, and ultimately pass the reconciliation bill. There is not a moment to waste.

Thank you for helping us keep up the pressure ? progress is only possible when we work together.

Onward,
Gene Karpisnki
LCV President

clean_body: Join us on September 22nd? ? ? ? ? i Dear Peter, As natural disasters like wildfires, hurricanes, floods, and draughts continue to escalate year over year, including Hurricane Ida, which the Washington Post recently called "the poster child for a climate change-driven disaster", the health and safety of our communities is at risk and people are suffering ? especially Black and Indigenous communities, communities of color, and low-wealth communities who are already being disproportionately harmed and displaced. However bleak the future may seem, I'm here to tell you ? there is hope. The most important climate legislation in a generation is being debated as you read this, Peter. Up for consideration in both the U.S. House and Senate is a bill that would put serious resources into clean energy. Funding for clean water. Clean air. Public lands. Environmental justice. There's a shot ? a real shot ? at passage. Our movement is fighting every day for our Earth, and we are making real progress. The pro-environment majority in Congress and pro-climate leaders in the Biden-Harris administration have a chance to enact impactful legislation for a clean energy economy, investments in environmental justice, and thousands of good-paying, union jobs. But this fight won't be over in a year, or even 5 years. At LCV, we're planning for the long-haul which is why we're bringing together our entire movement for an informative, inspiring, one-of-a-kind event later this month ? LCV's Climate Action Watch Party. Want to get access to unique advocacy resources, up-to-the-minute insider information, and hear from the most important environmental leaders of our time? Register today ? What is LCV's Climate Action Watch Party you might be asking? On Wednesday, September 22, 2021 we are bringing our community of thousands of members together to hear from climate champions from across the movement and get plugged into our plan for climate action. Ticket sales will go directly to our field campaigns, but also grant you entrance to one of our biggest events of the year, where you can hear from Senator Catherine Cortez Masto, Representative Lisa Blunt Rochester, and more to be announced! Our movement is fighting every day to protect our planet and everyone who inhabits it, and we are making real progress. There's a real chance to enact impactful legislation for a clean energy economy, investments in environmental justice, and thousands of good-paying, unionized jobs. If everyone reading this joins, we will be able to ensure our organizers have what they need to reach every voter and community leader where it matters most. Your continued support helps keep organizers knocking on doors and ads airing across channels, and ultimately pass the reconciliation bill. There is not a moment to waste. Thank you for helping us keep up the pressure ? progress is only possible when we work together. Onward, Gene Karpisnki LCV President ? ? ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information . Click here to unsubscribe from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, 7th Floor Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 ? ? ? ?Click here to unsubscribe

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Wishing you and yours a happy holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Friend,

The holiday season is a time to take joy in our shared humanity, to show appreciation for the people in our lives, and to reflect upon what is most important to us.

This was a year of both progress and upheaval — at home and abroad — and the spirit of this season strongly resonates as we reflect on all the ways that we have come together to help one another during these unique times. Our mutual generosity, determination, and resilience are proof of just how strong we remain when we come together.

I continue to be inspired by all of you who have worked to help those in need, fought for your values, and found big and small ways to bring love and laughs to those in your lives. You are why I have hope for the year ahead.

So, from my family to yours, I want to wish you a safe and happy holiday season. And may all who celebrate have a merry Christmas tomorrow!

Sincerely,

Jennifer
Paid for by Wexton for Congress
Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States

| | Dear Peter,

From all of us at The Collective PAC, we’d like to wish those who celebrate a Merry Christmas. We hope the coming days of celebration are filled with joy and time with those you love. We are so grateful for your support each and every day. And as we enter this holiday season, we want to thank you again for everything you do to help #BuildBlackPoliticalPower.

Merry Christmas!

The Collective PAC

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

body:

Some thoughts about our country as Christmas and the new year approach. In his Farewell Address to the nation in 1796, America’s departing first president, George Washington, observed: “It is substantially true that virtue or morality is a necessary spring to popular government.” And what is the basis upon which we define morality? Team, the holiday season is here, and now’s your chance to help Joe and Jill Biden celebrate!

**We have so much to be grateful for this holiday season.** The first family has restored dignity and public service to the White House, while tackling major issues like climate change, inflation, and gun safety -- and helping EXPAND our Senate majority in historic fashion!

To thank the President and First Lady for all they’ve done, we’re hoping to get 50,000 Democrats to sign our holiday card for them, **but right now we don’t have your name on file! So please, before midnight:**

[**Sign our holiday card and wish the Bidens Happy Holidays!**](http://go.dscc.org/go/11384?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221224-AddYourName-BidensHolidayCard-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221224-AddYourName-BidensHolidayCard-Pros-sl1&akid=9257%2E9716520%2EkmWbNO)

name: Team Grassley
subject: ‘Twas the Night Before Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
Chuck Grassley's version

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=b9309a0efaae4e338aad900a95431a53&_e=zMFApBZpdpbF4nD2uQ4bhm2mTvh_0EmXvbB3tQFSjlFmDQXmAT04I_0fwDOhqz0c2jFkhQdJl2Cw9yPT_52PSueLz3ZEeFzZZg1OQdxYbTirYMN7Zc8hKZAuQS5XK3uKF154lcJc9_lbLa38_aha9_Qx-bmyaATmEz8-SHtqsyUV57uQ_ZdSs7Ihjlhk4Q8lyQOBxX6WDnSi2CsC4ImeAK-EMf1GxME1RyvOqlP7UZqj8kvBqVo5MFljOqgcfpf1hl2GzagamX53x0wJLtRRSZRUe9UXYG8P5pTEn1zHpQjYE3Q4KPE6cKVck858KzcovHZ3aUEeUhHRfMUuL9tospmkmoG1iLWeyuoTVzTLq0BTxbRnORwm7kWGBygchA9oO0uA3ZlSZLXE0uvzf0GLLNtcTQdE3MyC2QYhlrYfHp6EIDxp8P_GmI-JQ8E-4oDvxzjAQE_dewa__b5ApzsjQklHdD6SsU3f1CEg6tylEPS6Ikrx_zXFOv55n5du3zAt39P5s4cfVD04T3smTesfpQ%3D%3D)
---
With the Christmas season upon us, many of us are looking forward to celebrating with family and friends. We wrote a poem to share with you to help lift your spirits as we head into 2023!

_**' TWAS THE NIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS: CHUCK GRASSLEY'S VERSION**_

'Twas the night before Christmas, when all through the Nation
Americans were worried about Biden's inflation

Grocery bills are through the roof, and energy prices are out of control
Bidenomics is taking its toll

Down at the Border, illegal crossings abound,
But neither President Biden or his 'Border Czar' are anywhere to be found

With Nancy Pelosi in her mask and Chuck Schumer in his cap
Sleepy Joe had just settled down for a looooong winter's nap

As I woke up before daybreak for my early morning run
I thought to myself, 2023 will be better, now that we've won!

| [**DONATE** ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=b9309a0efaae4e338aad900a95431a53&_e=zMFApBZpdpbF4nD2uQ4bhm2mTvh_0EmXvbB3tQFSjlFmDQXmAT04I_0fwDOhqz0c2jFkhQdJl2Cw9yPT_52PSueLz3ZEeFzZZg1OQdxYbTirYMN7Zc8hKZAuQS5XK3uKF154lcJc9_lbLa38_aha9_Qx-bmyaATmEz8-SHtqsyUV57uQ_ZdSs7Ihjlhk4Q8lyQOBxX6WDnSi2CsC4ImeAK-EMf1GxME1RyvOqlP7UZqj8kvBqVo5MFljOqgcfpf1hl2GzagamX53x0wJLtRRSZRUe9UXYG8P5pTEn1zHpQjYE3Q4KPE6cKVck858KzcovHZ3aUEeUhHRfMUuL9tospmkmoG1iLWeyuoTVzTLq0AXI77hApW_mv3Mii7MmM7bBm3jIPhKBd2s1C5RG2obz8qheZA-pi7Gp1B107BblRBuAKiRpyTOx9JzNxX6J0m9dynuXmkQoiBJjPUdzFucrn2Hunb6ef9jrsZi0jsrRoPIrOHNPzKPMOZqwrcNpgfAcs8zt-TEpdQJeKnvZ98e8XPEr-3l23BsCHxBF0WVNQw%3D)

clean_body: Chuck Grassley's version | With the Christmas season upon us, many of us are looking forward to celebrating with family and friends. We wrote a poem to share with you to help lift your spirits as we head into 2023! ' TWAS THE NIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS: CHUCK GRASSLEY'S VERSION 'Twas the night before Christmas, when all through the Nation Americans were worried about Biden's inflation Grocery bills are through the roof, and energy prices are out of control Bidenomics is taking its toll Down at the Border, illegal crossings abound, But neither President Biden or his 'Border Czar' are anywhere to be found With Nancy Pelosi in her mask and Chuck Schumer in his cap Sleepy Joe had just settled down for a looooong winter's nap As I woke up before daybreak for my early morning run I thought to myself, 2023 will be better, now that we've won! | - Team Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.
